category_description: Track your order and shipping times and delivery questions
article_title: How do I track my order?
article_excerpt: Get your tracking number and check your delivery status
article_body:
Once your order ships, you'll receive an email with your tracking number and a link to track your package. Most orders placed before 2 PM Arizona time ship the same day.

How it works

  1. Check your email — Look for a shipping confirmation from Suspension Superstore with your tracking number
  2. Click the tracking link — This takes you directly to the carrier's tracking page (UPS, FedEx, etc.)
  3. No email yet? — Orders typically ship within 1-2 business days. If it's been longer, contact us with your order number

Common issues

  • Tracking not updating — Carriers can take 24-48 hours to scan packages after pickup. If tracking hasn't updated in 3+ days, contact us.
  • Delivered but not received — Check around your property, with neighbors, or building management. If still missing, contact us immediately.

Still need help?

Contact us with:

  • Order number
  • Email address used for the order

category_description: Track your order and shipping times and delivery questions
article_title: How long does shipping take?
article_excerpt: Shipping times and free shipping policy and delivery estimates
article_body:
Most orders ship same day if placed before 2 PM Arizona time (Monday–Friday). Transit time is typically 2-5 business days depending on your location.

How it works

Free shipping is available on most orders to the contiguous United States (lower 48 states).

Estimated transit times from our warehouses:

  • Arizona, Texas, California — 2-4 business days to most US locations
  • Pennsylvania — 2-3 business days to East Coast

Factors that affect shipping time:

  • Orders placed after 2 PM AZ time or on weekends ship the next business day
  • Drop-ship items ship directly from the manufacturer (may take 3-7 business days)
  • Backorder or special order items will have a separate ETA provided

Common issues

  • Hawaii, Alaska, Puerto Rico — Free shipping does not apply. Additional shipping charges will be quoted.
  • Weekend orders — Orders placed Saturday/Sunday ship Monday.

Still need help?

Contact us with:

  • Order number or items you plan to order
  • Shipping ZIP code

category_description: Track your order and shipping times and delivery questions
article_title: Do you ship internationally?
article_excerpt: International shipping availability and costs
article_body:
Yes, we ship internationally. Shipping costs are calculated at checkout based on your destination and order weight.

How it works

  1. Add items to cart and proceed to checkout
  2. Enter your shipping address — International shipping options and costs will display
  3. Complete your order — You are responsible for any customs duties, taxes, or import fees charged by your country

Common issues

  • Customs/duties — These fees are collected by your country, not by us. We cannot predict or prepay these charges.
  • Delivery times — International orders typically take 7-21 business days depending on destination and customs processing.
  • Restricted items — Some products cannot be shipped internationally due to manufacturer restrictions.

Still need help?

Contact us with:

  • Items you want to order
  • Full shipping address including country

category_description: Track your order and shipping times and delivery questions
article_title: My order hasn't shipped yet
article_excerpt: What to do if your order is delayed or on backorder
article_body:
Most in-stock orders ship within 1-2 business days. If your order is delayed, it may be a drop-ship item, on backorder, or awaiting verification. Check your email for updates or contact us with your order number.

Common reasons for delays

  1. Drop-ship items — These ship directly from the manufacturer. Typical lead time is 3-7 business days, sometimes longer for specialty items.
  2. Backorder — The item is temporarily out of stock. We'll email you with an estimated ship date.
  3. Order verification — Your order may be on hold pending payment verification (see Why is my order on hold?")
  4. Special order — Some items are built or configured to order and have longer lead times.

Common issues

  • No update email — If you haven't received any communication within 3 business days
column13:
contact us.
  • Need it faster — Contact us to check if an alternative in-stock item is available.

    • Still need help?

    Contact us with:

    • Order number
    • Email address on the order

category_description: Track your order and shipping times and delivery questions
article_title: Why is my order on hold?
article_excerpt: Order verification for flagged transactions
article_body:
Some orders are flagged for verification when the billing and shipping information doesn't match, or the transaction is flagged as potentially fraudulent. This is for your protection.

How it works

  1. You'll receive an email asking you to complete a verification form
  2. Fill out the form at suspensionsuperstore.com/order-verification/
  3. Once verified, your order will be released and shipped

Common triggers for verification:

  • Billing address doesn't match the card on file
  • Shipping to a different address than billing
  • New credit card
  • Using someone else's card (with permission)

Common issues

  • Didn't receive the email — Check your spam folder, or contact us to resend
  • Need it urgently — Call us at 866-409-8673 to verify over the phone

Still need help?

Contact us with:

  • Order number
  • Phone number to reach you

category_description: Return or exchange parts and cancel orders and refund policies
article_title: How do I return a part?
article_excerpt: Start a return and get your RMA number
article_body:
Submit a return request within 30 days of receiving your order. You'll receive an RMA (Return Merchandise Authorization) number to include on your package.

How it works

  1. Submit a return request at suspensionsuperstore.com/return-authorization-request/
  2. Receive your RMA number via email (usually within 24 hours)
  3. Write the RMA number on the outside of the box — Returns without an RMA may be refused
  4. Ship the item back to the address provided in your RMA email
  5. Refund or exchange processed within 24-48 hours of receiving your return

Common issues

  • Item must be NEW and uninstalled — Parts that have been installed or show signs of use cannot be returned for refund.
  • Original packaging required — Keep all packaging until you're sure you won't need to return.

Still need help?

Contact us with:

  • Order number
  • Reason for return
  • Photos if item is defective

category_description: Return or exchange parts and cancel orders and refund policies
article_title: What is your return policy?
article_excerpt: Return window and conditions and fees explained
article_body:
Returns must be initiated within 30 days of receipt. Items must be in NEW, uninstalled condition. A 20% restocking fee applies to refunds, plus you pay return shipping.

How it works

For refunds:

  • 20% restocking fee applies
  • You pay shipping both ways (original and return)
  • Refund = price paid minus shipping and restocking fee

For exchanges or store credit:

  • No restocking fee
  • You pay return shipping only
  • Full credit for the item price

No fees if we made a mistake:

  • Wrong item shipped
  • Item arrived damaged
  • Defective product

Common issues

  • Installed parts — Cannot be returned. Even partially installed parts are not eligible.
  • Special orders — May have different return policies communicated at time of purchase.

Still need help?

Contact us with:

  • Order number
  • What you'd like to do (refund, exchange, or store credit)

category_description: Return or exchange parts and cancel orders and refund policies
article_title: Can I exchange for a different part?
article_excerpt: Exchange process and what to expect
article_body:
Yes, you can exchange for a different part. Submit a return request and select Exchange as your preference. No restocking fee applies to exchanges.

How it works

  1. Submit a return request at suspensionsuperstore.com/return-authorization-request/
  2. Tell us what you need instead — Include the correct part number or describe what you're looking for
  3. Ship the original item back — You pay return shipping
  4. We ship your replacement — Once your return is in transit back to us, we'll ship the new item

Price difference:

  • If the new part costs more, we'll send a payment link
  • If it costs less, we'll refund the difference

Still need help?

Contact us with:

  • Order number
  • Part number you want instead (or Year/Make/Model/Trim if unsure)

category_description: Return or exchange parts and cancel orders and refund policies
article_title: How do I cancel my order?
article_excerpt: Cancel before shipment and refund timing
article_body:
Contact us as soon as possible to cancel. If your order hasn't shipped yet, we can cancel and issue a full refund. Once shipped, you'll need to return it.

How it works

  1. Contact us immediately — Call 866-409-8673 or email for fastest response
  2. If not yet shipped — We'll cancel and refund in full
  3. If already shipped — You'll need to either refuse delivery or submit a return request once received

Refund timing: Allow 24-48 hours for your bank to process the refund after cancellation.

Common issues

  • Order already shipped — We cannot cancel orders in transit. You can refuse delivery or return once received.
  • Drop-ship orders — These may be harder to cancel once submitted to the manufacturer. Contact us immediately.

Still need help?

Contact us with:

  • Order number
  • Reason for cancellation (helps us improve)

category_description: Return or exchange parts and cancel orders and refund policies
article_title: How long do refunds take?
article_excerpt: Refund processing time after return received
article_body:
Refunds are processed within 24-48 hours of receiving your return. Your bank may take an additional 3-5 business days to post the credit to your account.

How it works

  1. Return received — We inspect the item to confirm it's in returnable condition
  2. Refund processed — Within 24-48 hours of receipt
  3. Credit appears — Your bank processes the refund (typically 3-5 business days)

Refund amount:

  • Item price minus 20% restocking fee (if applicable)
  • Original shipping is not refunded

Common issues

  • Refund not showing — Check with your bank. Provide them the date we processed the refund.
  • Amount seems wrong — Remember the 20% restocking fee and original shipping are deducted from refunds.

Still need help?

Contact us with:

  • Order number
  • Return tracking number

category_description: Fitment basics and installation guides and warranty info
article_title: Will this part fit my vehicle?
article_excerpt: What we need to verify fitment for Year Make Model Trim
article_body:
Fitment depends on your specific vehicle. To verify compatibility, we need your Year, Make, Model, and Trim level. For lift or lowering kits, we also need your current lift height and intended use (daily driving, off-road, towing).

Information we need

  • Year (e.g., 2024)
  • Make (e.g., Ford)
  • Model (e.g., F-150)
  • Trim/Package (e.g., XLT, Lariat, Raptor)
  • 2WD or 4WD
  • Current suspension setup (stock, lifted, lowered)
  • Tire size you plan to run

Where to find your trim level: Driver's door jamb sticker, vehicle registration, or owner's manual.

Common issues

  • Trim matters — A base model and premium trim may have different suspension components.
  • 2WD vs 4WD — Many parts are not interchangeable between 2WD and 4WD versions.
  • Modified vehicles — If your truck is already lifted or lowered, this affects what parts will work.

Still need help?

Contact us with:

  • Year / Make / Model / Trim
  • 2WD or 4WD
  • Current setup (stock, lifted X inches, lowered X inches)
  • What you're trying to achieve

category_description: Fitment basics and installation guides and warranty info
article_title: Where are installation instructions?
article_excerpt: Find install guides and videos for your kit
article_body:
Installation instructions are available on our website and from each manufacturer. Visit our Installation Instructions page or check the manufacturer's website for your specific kit.

How to find instructions

  1. Visit suspensionsuperstore.com/installation-instructions/
  2. Search by brand or part number
  3. Download the PDF or watch video guides

Manufacturer resources:

  • Most kits include printed instructions in the box
  • Manufacturers often have video tutorials on YouTube
  • Search [Brand name] [Part number] install for community guides

Common issues

  • Instructions not in box — Contact us with your order number and we'll send them.
  • Can't find for your kit — Contact us with the part number and we'll locate them.

Still need help?

Contact us with:

  • Part number or order number
  • Your vehicle Year/Make/Model

category_description: Fitment basics and installation guides and warranty info
article_title: How do I file a warranty claim?
article_excerpt: Warranty is handled by manufacturers - contact info here
article_body:
Warranty claims are handled directly by the manufacturer, not by Suspension Superstore. Each brand has their own warranty process and contact information.

How it works

Contact the manufacturer directly with:

  • Proof of purchase (your order confirmation)
  • Photos of the defect or issue
  • Description of the problem

Manufacturer warranty contacts

  • MaxTrac — Phone: 714-630-0363 | Email: sales@maxtracsuspension.com
  • Belltech — belltech.com/contact-us/
  • Cognito — cognitomotorsports.com/warranty
  • IHC Suspension — ihcsuspension.com/warranty-claim/

Common issues

  • Not sure which brand — Check your order confirmation or the part itself for the manufacturer name.
  • No response from manufacturer — Contact us and we'll help facilitate.

Still need help?

Contact us with:

  • Order number
  • Brand and part number
  • Description and photos of the issue

category_description: Fitment basics and installation guides and warranty info
article_title: Do you offer military or first responder discounts?
article_excerpt: Discounts for military and first responders
article_body:
Yes, we offer discounts for military personnel and first responders. Use code USA1 at checkout to receive your discount.

How it works

  1. Add items to your cart
  2. Enter code USA1 at checkout
  3. Discount will be applied to your order

Eligible personnel:

  • Active duty military
  • Veterans
  • Police officers
  • Firefighters
  • EMTs and paramedics

Still need help?

Contact us if you have questions about discount eligibility.

category_description: Become a dealer and tax exemption and wholesale FAQs
article_title: How do I become a dealer?
article_excerpt: Apply for a dealer account and wholesale pricing
article_body:
Fill out our dealer application form and we'll set you up within 1-2 business days. No monthly minimums or buy-ins required.

How it works

  1. Submit dealer application — Visit the dealer application page on our website
  2. We review your application — Usually within 1-2 business days
  3. Receive confirmation — We'll email you when your account is active
  4. Start ordering — Contact us via phone, email, text, or live chat for pricing and availability

What you'll need:

  • Business name and contact info
  • Resale certificate or business license
  • Tax exempt certificate (if applicable)

Common issues

  • No online portal yet — Currently, dealer orders are placed by contacting our team directly via phone, email, text, or live chat.
  • Pricing questions — Contact us for dealer pricing on specific items.

Still need help?

Contact us:

  • Phone: 866-409-8673
  • Email: Help@accessorypartners.com
  • Text/SMS: 602-755-2988
  • WhatsApp: 602-666-9860

category_description: Become a dealer and tax exemption and wholesale FAQs
article_title: How do I update my tax exempt certificate?
article_excerpt: Submit your updated tax exemption form
article_body:
Email your updated tax exempt certificate to Help@accessorypartners.com. We'll update your account within 24 hours.

How it works

  1. Get your current certificate — Make sure it's valid for the current year
  2. Email it to us — Send to Help@accessorypartners.com with your business name in the subject line
  3. Confirmation — We'll reply when your account is updated

Important: Tax exempt certificates expire annually. Update yours at the start of each year to avoid delays or unexpected tax charges.

Still need help?

Contact us with:

  • Business name on your dealer account
  • Updated tax exempt certificate attached

category_description: Become a dealer and tax exemption and wholesale FAQs
article_title: Do you have a dealer portal?
article_excerpt: How to place orders as a dealer
article_body:
We don't have an online dealer portal yet. Dealer orders are placed by contacting our team directly via phone, email, text, or live chat.

How to place a dealer order

  • Phone: 866-409-8673
  • Email: Help@accessorypartners.com
  • Text/SMS: 602-755-2988
  • WhatsApp: 602-666-9860
  • Live Chat: Available on our website

Our team can provide dealer pricing, check availability, and process your order.

Hours: 7:00 AM – 4:00 PM Arizona Time, Monday–Friday

Still need help?

Contact us using any of the methods above.

category_description: Damaged and missing or incorrect shipments
article_title: My order arrived damaged
article_excerpt: Report damage and get a replacement
article_body:
Contact us immediately with photos of the damage. We'll work with you to get a replacement shipped as quickly as possible.

How it works

  1. Take photos — Document the damaged packaging AND the damaged parts before discarding anything
  2. Contact us — Email or text us with your order number and photos
  3. We file a claim — We handle the shipping claim on your behalf
  4. Replacement shipped — Once approved, we ship your replacement (often same day)

Important: Keep all original packaging until the claim is resolved. The carrier may need to inspect it.

What to photograph

  • Outside of the shipping box (all sides showing damage)
  • Inside packaging
  • The damaged part(s)
  • Shipping label

Still need help?

Contact us with:

  • Order number
  • Photos of damage (packaging and parts)
  • Description of what's damaged

category_description: Damaged and missing or incorrect shipments
article_title: My order is missing parts
article_excerpt: Report missing hardware or components
article_body:
Contact us with your order number and what's missing. We'll ship the missing parts right away.

How it works

  1. Double-check the packaging — Sometimes small hardware bags are tucked inside larger boxes or wrapped in padding
  2. Contact us — Let us know your order number and exactly what's missing
  3. We ship replacements — Missing parts are typically shipped same or next business day

Common missing items

  • Hardware bags (bolts, nuts, U-bolts)
  • Instruction sheets
  • Smaller components bundled separately

Still need help?

Contact us with:

  • Order number
  • Part number of the kit
  • List of what's missing (be specific — e.g., missing 4 U-bolts)

category_description: Damaged and missing or incorrect shipments
article_title: I received the wrong item
article_excerpt: What to do if you got the wrong part
article_body:
Contact us with your order number and photos of what you received. We'll ship the correct item and arrange return of the wrong one at no cost to you.

How it works

  1. Contact us — Provide your order number and photos of the item you received
  2. We verify the error — We'll check what was ordered vs. what shipped
  3. Correct item shipped — We ship the right part, often same day
  4. Return the wrong item — We'll send a prepaid return label for the incorrect part

No fees: If we shipped the wrong item, there's no restocking fee and we cover return shipping.

Still need help?

Contact us with:

  • Order number
  • Photo of the item received (including part number label if visible)
  • What you expected to receive
